title: hieracium spathulatum subsp. albacetum
intro: Hieracium spathulatum subsp. albacetum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion genus (Hieracium). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hieracium spathulatum subsp. albacetum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
